title: Enga Chinna Rasa
desc: Chinnarasu, naive boy loves his stepmother dearly and fails to see her evil actions as she takes advantage of him. Later, she plots to kill him for his property.

title: Chinna Thayee
desc: Rasamma strives to ensure a proper life for her daughter Chinna, who is born out of wedlock. But her worst fear comes true when her daughter follows her footsteps and falls in love with a rich man.

title: Veera Padhakkam
desc: A corrupt, ambitious policeman is forced to mend his ways after witnessing the consequences of his role in a relative's life.

title: January 1st
desc: When a series of mysterious murders rock the city, a courageous inspector, Mano, sets out to capture the culprit and restore order.

title: Maanasthan
desc: Deiva, a successful farmer and obedient son, is stunned when his father learns he's not his biological child. Betrayed, his father asks him to leave, leading Deiva on a journey of self-discovery.
